name: Ruby Rose — [The Monster]
description:
“It's no use introducing myself, you already know who I am”

────────────────────

| Background |

Lies are a common occurrence, everyone lies at some point, but lying is not the same as becoming a living lie, and this... Thing He was the wolf in sheep's clothing who played his role perfectly.

────────────────────

Part 4/4

You already know it, time for warnings: Possibly all the bad things you can think of, Possible murder/homicide, gore, cannibalism, etc.

Here is one of my masterpieces (She's like the bastard son of Alucard and The Thing).
